boundary: Synthetic demo fixtures only. No external source rows, credentials, private data, production data, or live network checks are included.

lineage_summary.runtime_claim: The fixture model is informed by public standards and control concepts; no external source rows are imported into this repository.
lineage_summary.display_disclosure: Reference descriptors identify conceptual inputs only. All displayed institution, entity, wallet, account, and payment values are synthetic.
